queries.question: Provide a list of all university students and also provide a list of college students studying Business Administration.
queries.sql:
SELECT Students.FullName
FROM Students
WHERE Students.HigherEducationInstitution = "University" OR Students.HigherEducationInstitution = "College" AND Students.AcademicProgram = "Business Administration"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?students p:HigherEducationInstitution ?highereducationinstitution_w .
  ?students p:HigherEducationInstitution ?highereducationinstitution_w2 .
  ?students p:AcademicProgram ?academicprogram_w .
  FILTER((STR(?highereducationinstitution_w) = "University" || (STR(?highereducationinstitution_w2) = "College" && STR(?academicprogram_w) = "Business Administration")))
}

queries.question: List all university students and college students studying Business Administration.
queries.sql:
SELECT Students.FullName
FROM Students
WHERE (Students.HigherEducationInstitution = "University" OR Students.HigherEducationInstitution = "College") AND Students.AcademicProgram = "Business Administration"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?students p:HigherEducationInstitution ?highereducationinstitution_w .
  ?students p:HigherEducationInstitution ?highereducationinstitution_w2 .
  ?students p:AcademicProgram ?academicprogram_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?highereducationinstitution_w) = "University" || STR(?highereducationinstitution_w2) = "College")) && STR(?academicprogram_w) = "Business Administration"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all university students and college students studying Business Administration.
